rationale: No qualitative new developments directly affecting Poland this cycle; Iran deal progress continues as background, war in Ukraine unchanged.

top_events.title: Iran: deal would lead to Hormuz reopening
top_events.summary: Iran reaffirms that a peace deal with the US would reopen Hormuz, keeping energy price relief hopes alive for Poland. No signed agreement yet — continuation of prior momentum.

top_events.title: Trump seeks 'off-ramp' from Iran war
top_events.summary: US diplomatic push on Iran continues without a breakthrough. For Poland, this sustains the possibility of lower energy costs but remains unresolved.

top_events.title: China arrests US academic for espionage
top_events.summary: Rising US-China tensions could have indirect EU trade and geopolitical implications, but no direct impact on Poland's daily life at this stage.
